method_summary: A declarative stack that encodes experiments as configurations, which are compiled to device-level APIs for AI-driven scientific discovery.
key_innovation: The synthesis of a general, science- and instrument-independent stack bridging AI agents and automated lab equipment through declarative experiment configurations.
limitations_stated: The paper acknowledges that Eureka moments could occur at any time while operating lab instruments, which may not be fully captured by the proposed automated system.
title: Experiment-as-Code Labs: A Declarative Stack for AI-Driven Scientific Discovery
